goal: Fix three invoice table display policy issues identified in 3D-3 manual smoke: trade_4 totalAmount row column exposure, trade_6 lotNo noise-suppression false positive, trade_7 serialLotComposite internal-filter false positive. invoiceTableDisplay.ts and Python re-impls only; helper/component code untouched; only trade_4/6/7 fixtures regenerate.

modifiedFiles.change: Added _SUMMARY_KEYS={totalAmount} hard exclude; added _EXPLICIT_COMPOSITE_ALLOWLIST={serialLotComposite}; lot 노이즈 rule now exempts explicit lot keys; lot/mfg dup + serialNo dup + itemCode 5% rules remain unconditional.
Identical Python re-impl patch: SUMMARY_KEYS + EXPLICIT_COMPOSITE_ALLOWLIST + narrower lot 노이즈 exemption.

SUMMARY_KEYS.behavior: hard-excluded from all candidate-key paths regardless of expectedColumnKeys

EXPLICIT_COMPOSITE_ALLOWLIST.behavior: composite key bypasses isInternalTableKey only when (key in allowlist AND key in explicitlyExpected)

lotNoiseRuleExemption.rule: remove lot keys if itemCode has value AND manufacturingNo has no value
lotNoiseRuleExemption.exemption: skip rule for lot keys where isExplicit(key) is true

unchangedDedupRules.lotMfgDupRule: still applies unconditionally — preserves trade_1 lotNo dup suppression

iterationNotes: 1st pass (overly broad): explicit bypass applied to ALL dedup rules → trade_1 lotNo (dup of mfg) + trade_3 manufacturingExpiryComposite surfaced unexpectedly. Restored fixtures from safety backup.

2nd pass (narrower): SUMMARY_KEYS hard exclude + composite allowlist (only serialLotComposite) + lot 노이즈 rule explicit exemption ONLY. lot/mfg dup / serialNo dup / itemCode 5% rules remain unconditional. Result: only trade_4/6/7 changed as intended.

Manifest regeneration ordering: view_model_fixture_lock.py overwrites manifest, dropping inputFixturePath and lockedCurrentBehavior fields added by input_fixture_prep.py. Solution: run input_fixture_prep.py one more time AFTER view_model lock to restore those fields.
remainingRisks: Manual smoke not yet performed in real browser — automatic checks pass but visual confirmation of trade_4/6/7 column changes recommended before cycle 1 close-out.
EXPLICIT_COMPOSITE_ALLOWLIST is hardcoded to {serialLotComposite}. Adding more composites in future requires explicit allowlist update OR a generalized template column definition mechanism.
trade_1 lotNo remains suppressed by lot/mfg dup rule even though it's in expectedColumnKeys. Acceptable now but may need re-evaluation when Template column definition is introduced.
Manifest regeneration order dependency between view_model_fixture_lock.py and input_fixture_prep.py — fragile. Consolidation into single script suggested for future.
nextSuggestedTasks: Manual smoke re-confirmation on /runocr for trade_4/6/7 column changes.
OcrResultPanel cleanup cycle 1 close-out report (mark manual smoke WARN resolved when smoke passes).
Custom / Validation view model migration (cycle 2 candidate).
Legacy parseTableField fallback view model (buildLegacyTableViewModel) — separate cycle.
Template table column definition introduction (would replace allowlist hardcoding).
TestWorkspace cleanup re-confirmation after cycle 1 close-out.
